prompt: List my upcoming scheduled payments with amounts and due dates, and let me pay the next one right now from my checking account.
wire:
export default function PayNextPanel() { const [phase, setPhase] = useState("idle"); const [payments, setPayments] = useState([]); const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listScheduledPayments({}).then((r) => setPayments(r.data || [])); tools.host_listAccounts({}).then((r) => setAccounts(r.data || [])); }, []); const next = payments[0]; const checking = accounts.find((a) => a.type === "checking" || (a.name && a.name.toLowerCase().includes("checking"))); const pay = async () => { if (!next) return; setPhase("sending"); setError(null); try { const result = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: next.amountCents, recipient_name: next.payeeName, memo: next.description || next.payeeName, }); setPhase(result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "done"); } catch (e) { setError("Something went wrong. Please try again."); setPhase("idle"); } }; if (!next) return (
No upcoming scheduled payments found.
); return (
Paying next {next.payeeName} {fmt.money(next.amountCents)} — due {fmt.dateTime(next.dueDate)}
{checking && (
From: {checking.name}  ·  Balance: {fmt.money(checking.balanceCents)}
)} {error && (
{error}
)} {phase === "awaiting" && (
⏳ Awaiting your approval to complete this payment…
)} {phase === "done" && (
✓ Payment sent successfully.
)} {(phase === "idle" || phase === "sending") && ( )}
); }
